_comment: Inline policy for the EC2 instance role (the box's identity). The ONLY thing the box needs from AWS is to assume the shafa cross-account role the app uses at RUNTIME for S3 (photos) + SES (email) — CLAUDE.md #17; base creds come from THIS instance role via the default chain. No deploy-bucket and no SSM permissions: deploy is over SSH. SSM Session Manager is optional break-glass — if you want a no-SSH admin path, ALSO attach the AWS-managed 'AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'. Replace <CROSS_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ARN>.
